RoyalTitleDef.label: Civilian Assistant
RoyalTitleDef.description: A civilian collaborator temporarily attached to USAC logistics and support duties under supervision.

RoyalTitleDef.label: Civilian Aide
RoyalTitleDef.description: A vetted civilian helper handling structured support tasks for USAC field units.

RoyalTitleDef.label: Civilian Coordinator
RoyalTitleDef.description: A senior civilian liaison trusted to coordinate logistics, procurement, and mission-side administration.

RoyalTitleDef.label: Private
RoyalTitleDef.description: The first true soldier rank, formally enlisted for frontline and field operations.

RoyalTitleDef.label: Corporal
RoyalTitleDef.description: A frontline soldier assigned limited team-level responsibility in active operations.

RoyalTitleDef.label: Ceremonial Sergeant
RoyalTitleDef.description: A nominal endpoint title awarded for loyalty and optics; it does not grant additional command authority.
